data.title: merge-to-main.sh --bump flag hallucinated as --bump-version causing wrong version type in minor bumps
data.description: During a session where a minor version bump was requested before merging to main, the agent used --version-bump=minor instead of --bump minor when calling merge-to-main.sh. The --version-bump=minor flag was silently ignored (unrecognized argument), causing a patch bump (1.12.46) instead of the intended minor bump (1.13.0). The CLAUDE.md Quick Reference table only shows 'merge-to-main.sh [--resume]' with no mention of version bump flags. The merge-to-main.sh docs/help output should prominently list --bump as the correct flag for version type selection to prevent agents from hallucinating --version-bump or similar flag names.
